name: Cyble Vision
description: Integrate with Cyble Vision threat intelligence platform to search IOCs, dark web mentions, compromised credentials, and vulnerability intelligence

auth_config.note: Bearer token authentication. Token obtained from Cyble Vision dashboard API settings.

actions.name: Lookup IOC
actions.description: Search for an indicator of compromise in Cyble Vision including dark web and surface web intelligence

parameters.name: ioc
parameters.description: IOC value to search (IP, domain, hash, URL, email)

parameters.name: ioc_type
parameters.description: IOC type: ip, domain, md5, sha1, sha256, url, email

actions.name: Search IP Address
actions.description: Retrieve threat intelligence for an IP address including reputation, geolocation, and dark web exposure

actions.name: Search Domain
actions.description: Retrieve threat intelligence for a domain including reputation, subdomains, and dark web mentions

actions.name: Search File Hash
actions.description: Retrieve threat intelligence for a file hash including malware family identification and dark web context

actions.name: Search Compromised Credentials
actions.description: Search Cyble Vision for compromised credentials associated with a domain or email from dark web breaches

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Email address or domain to search for compromised credentials

actions.name: Get Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve Cyble Vision alerts for your organization's monitored assets and keywords

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Alert severity filter: critical, high, medium, low

actions.name: Search Dark Web
actions.description: Search Cyble Vision dark web monitoring data for mentions of assets, brands, or keywords

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Dark web source filter (forum, marketplace, paste, telegram)
